title: tag v1.16.2
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind other

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Bumps our versioning to v1.16.2.

#### How to verify it

Visual inspection

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

None

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```
Specifying the location of content to be added by `buildah add` using a relative path should work again.
```
